name: Strawberry Elaichi Cookie
description: A moist strawberry flavored cookie infused with ground cardamom, topped with strawberry frosting and sprinkled with fresh cardomom powder.

name: Thandai Cookie
description: All the flavors of the traditonal Holi drink, then drizzled with white icing and garnished with a mixture of pistachios almond crumbs and rose petals.

name: Quadruple Chocolate Cookie
description: A whole lotta chocolate! fluffy soft chocolate fudge cookie with chocolate chips, topped with chocolate fudge frosting and more chocolate chips.

name: Pistacio Creme Cookie
description: A soft pistachio pudding cookie with white cream frosting, garnished with pistachio crumbs.

name: Pina Colada Cookie
description: A pineapple flavored cookie topped with white frosting, dried pineapple pieces and shredded coconut.

name: Masala Chai Cookie
description: A chai masala blend infused cookie, topped with white frosting and garnished with cinnamon sticks and star anise pods.

name: Cookies & Cream Cookie
description: A warm chocolate cookie mixed with cookies & cream pieces, topped with smooth vanilla cream cheese frosting.

name: Peanutella Biscoff Cookie
description: A simple peanut butter cookie with not-so-simple toppings of nutella and biscoff.

name: Celebration Cookie
description: A fluffy sugar cookie topped with white frosting and sprinkled with various colored sprinkles.

name: Cinnamon Sugar Cookie
description: A classic vanilla sugar cookie rolled in a sparkly cinnamon sugar coating. Warm and cozy.
